Step 2: Per Yoda:

Smart you must work, not hard.

Step 3: Also per Yoda:

Know, you must. Guess, do not.

docs.title: Here's some YAML code:
docs.text:
# Project information
site_name: My Super Cool Test Docs Website Project Thing
site_url: https://aeisan18.github.io/DocsWebsite
site_author: Adam Eisan

# Repository
repo_name: DocsWebsite
repo_url: https://github.com/aeisan18/DocsWebsite
edit_uri: edit/master/my-test-folder
docs_dir: my-test-folder


##########################################################################
# Navigation
##########################################################################
nav:
  - Welcome:
    - About: README.md   
    # - Stuff for Kurt: Welcome/kurt.md   
    - Stuff for Kurt: kurt.md   
  - Section2:
    - More stuff: README2.md   
  - Tags: tags.md


## DO NOT CHANGE BELOW THIS LINE

docs.title: Hello World
docs.text:
This is my first blog.

Today, I learned a lot of MkDocs and how to easily create a documentation website and blog.

Fun!

docs.title: A Post from Mobile
docs.text:
Well, here we are. This is my first attempt to oost something from my phone remotely and oush to thr blog.

Lets see how it goes!

It didn't go well. Try again...

docs.title: A Post from Mobile - Part Deux
docs.text:
So, the first attempt at posting from my phone did not work. I forgot to add the metadata at the top of the file.

This time… I remembered to put the mediator. Fingers crossed that this one works.

let's see…

😄
